# Destinations

Under international-shipping destinations, acme-shop currently ships to Japan, South Korea, Hong Kong, Macau, Singapore, Malaysia, the United States, and Canada. This list reflects the active international destinations supported at present.

[Source: international_shipping.md#destinations]
